title: Haworthia recurva
taxonomy: Haworthia recurva is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It is a succulent plant native to South Africa. This plant is further categorized under the genus Haworthia, which is a group of small to medium-sized succulents. Haworthia recurva is a specific type of Haworthia, known for its unique and curved leaves. The classification of Haworthia recurva also includes its botanical name, which is often used in horticulture and botanical research.
